results.title: How Blackpool Victoria Hospital will play a huge part in tackling waiting times for ADHD and autism referrals
results.description: Many children’s referrals will now be transferred to Blackpool Teaching Hospitals.

results.title: Your World Cup team's been knocked out. Which semifinalist should you root for?
results.description: So, your team of choice has been knocked out of the World Cup. You want to keep watching, but you may need a rooting interest to stay invested.

results.title: Social media reacts to Conor McGregor injuring knee in opening moments of return fight vs. Max Holloway
results.description: Conor McGregor's attempt at a return ended as soon as the fight started. The Sporting News compiled reactions to the fight at UFC 329, highlighting discussions about McGregor's injury.
